hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('file_path',''); import subprocess; r=subprocess.run(['pnpm','typecheck'],capture_output=True,text=True,cwd='/Users/eduardojaviergarcialopez/AgenticEngineering/agentforge/.claude/worktrees/documentation-update') if fp.endswith(('.ts','.tsx')) else None; print((r.stdout+r.stderr)[-600:]) if r and (r.stdout+r.stderr).strip() else None" 2>/dev/null

python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('file_path',''); print('\u26a0\ufe0f  TEMPLATE SYNC REQUIRED: Run pnpm sync-templates (CLAUDE.md Rule 6)') if '/convex/' in fp else None" 2>/dev/null
